name: 尼古拉斯·迪·普里马
name_full: 尼古拉斯·迪·普里马 Nicholas Di Prima
introduction: Nicholas Di Prima was born and raised in the small town of Albertville, Alabama. He grew up performing in countless stage productions and spent much of his adolescence competing in theatre competitions around the United States. At the age of 17, Nicholas was one of ten students selected from over a thousand participants to be awarded the Freddie G. Award for Outstanding Individual Male at the Junior Theatre Festival located in Atlanta, Georgia. His passion for performing pushed him to continue acting during his time at Samford University, which led him to discover his love for acting for the screen. Since graduation, Nicholas has been pursuing film in Atlanta, Georgia and has most recently wrapped production for the upcoming short "Reprieve".
